title: Unfaithful
subTitle: When a suburban wife meets a Manhattan book dealer and begins an affair, her husband begins to suspect something and hires a detective. Soon learning the truth, the husband takes matters into his own hands and decides to confront his wife's lover.

title: Nowhere to Hide
subTitle: Tara fears she is losing her mind like her mother did, as unsettling events make her worry she is heading down the same path of mental illness.

title: Python Island
subTitle: A group of explorers set out to search for a magical tree in the jungle and soon find a mysterious creature is waiting to attack them.

title: The Legend of Loulan
subTitle: When young archaeologist Wu Tian finds a mirror from the Loulan civilisation, he goes on a mission to protect the treasure of the civilisation and uncover the secrets of the mysterious Ghost Army.

title: Journey to the East
subTitle: An enchanted fish is encouraged by Han Xiang Zi to leap over the governor's palace into the parched land. Han Xiang Zi later realises there is much more to the magical fish than meets the eye.

title: White Haired Princess
subTitle: An ambitious eunuch takes undue advantage of the Emperor's illness to seize control over the Ming dynasty. However, an unforeseen rebellion erupts after the king recovers from his illness.

title: Muzzle
subTitle: Muzzle is a gripping Cop & K9 thriller of vengeance and betrayal, an LAPD K9 and his K-9 partner battle on the streets of LA when they get into a shootout with local drug dealers and his K9 is shot dead. Driven by grief, our hero go rogue.

title: The Marsh King's Daughter
subTitle: Helena is haunted by memories of her estranged father Jacob, who held her and her mother captive for years. However, when he escapes prison, she becomes paranoid as she prepares for his arrival.

title: The Balkan Line
subTitle: During a secret mission in war-torn Kosovo, Shatalov and his team must secure a vital airport while battling militants and racing against time to protect innocent lives.

title: Hotel Mumbai
subTitle: A hotel staff risks everything to keep its patrons safe during a terror attack, especially a British heiress, her husband and her infant.

title: Gringo
subTitle: Harold Soyinka, who works for a pharmaceutical company, visits Mexico to supervise his firm's manufacturing plant. He then decides to plot his own abduction to make quick money.

title: Shadow in the Cloud
subTitle: A WWII pilot is assigned a secret mission to travel with confidential documents on a Boeing B-17 Flying Fortress. However, she soon has to deal with an evil presence on board.

title: Talk to Me
subTitle: When a group of friends discover how to conjure spirits using an embalmed hand, they become hooked on the new thrill. But their overzealousness ultimately unleashes terrifying supernatural forces.

title: The Beast
subTitle: In an AI ruled future, Gabrielle signs up for a DNA purification that will rid her of unnecessary emotions. However, reliving her past lives as part of the process turns unnerving.

title: Jurassic Attack
subTitle: Following their latest covert operation, an elite squad's return flight ends in disaster, leaving them stranded in a remote forest amongst prehistoric predators.

title: Higher Power
subTitle: A mad scientist scours the DNA of everyone on Earth to find someone capable of saving the planet. Soon, he kidnaps Joe, a former alcoholic, and his experiments impart a strange power to Joe.

title: Poseidon Rex
subTitle: During the quest for a lost treasure, things take a dangerous turn as a group of deep-sea divers accidentally awaken an aquatic dinosaur.

title: Mega Crocodile
subTitle: A researcher is commissioned to search for a missing person on the Hell Island full of crocodiles but soon find themselves endangered when giant crocodiles begin threatening their lives.

subTitle: An accident causes a great white shark to turn into a killing mutant. However, the problem worsens when the beast receives the ability to overpower humans.

subTitle: Lorraine Broughton, who works as a spy for MI6, is sent on a mission to Berlin just before the collapse of the wall, to get hold of a stolen list, which has the names of exceptional secret agents.

title: Mayhem
subTitle: A virus spreads through a law firm, transforming all the employees into uninhibited, violent zombies. But a recently fired employee, Derek, decides to fight through the horde to get to his job back.
